description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named WarpBuf that can be triggered manually, on push to WarpBuf/ paths, or on pull requests. The workflow should build WarpBuf for multiple platforms including ubuntu-x86_64, macos-x86_64, and win64. For each platform, check out the repository with submodules, install dependencies, build Libsndfile and WarpBuf, and upload a zipped artifact.
